fato_historico: 1944: World War II: Adolf Hitler survives an assassination attempt led by German Army Colonel Claus von Stauffenberg.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos hums with a resilient vibration today. Much like a hidden strength surfacing in history, you may find that challenges are merely catalysts for growth. It is a good time to trust your intuition and speak your truth with clarity. Consider how your perspective can rewrite your own personal narrative, turning obstacles into stepping stones toward golden light.
frase_do_dia: True courage blooms even in the quietest moments of your daily journey.
significado_numero: Represents duality, partnership, and the harmony between your dual celestial natures.
conselho: Trust your inner compass and choose peace over conflict in every situation today.
